channel.title: security on Macaroni OS
channel.description: Recent content in security on Macaroni OS

item.title: Copy Fail and Dirty Frag on Macaroni OS
item.description: A little detail about recent security issues in the Linux world and their impact on the Macaroni OS ecosystem. Copy Fail on Macaroni OS Recently, several important CVEs (CVE-2026-31431, CVE-2026-43500, etc.) have shaken the Linux world. We are talking about Copy Fail, Dirty Frag, and related exploits. We are surprised that an important mitigation strategy is not yet been shared and we want instead share what is been analyzed by the Macaroni OS Team.
